steps.title: Compare the spoiler gaps
steps.content: The statement says spoilers increased enjoyment for every story, but the size of the increase varied. The needed pair should show noticeably different gaps between spoiled and unspoiled ratings.

steps.title: Choose the clearest contrast
steps.content: Choice B, Choice C, and Choice D do not illustrate the variation in spoiler effect as directly. The graph's clearest contrast in the size of the spoiled-versus-unspoiled gap is between Blitzed and Plumbing. The answer is A.
